validationErrors.message: Evidence is missing required operation assertions: audit.
Audit assertions require at least one audit event summary.
Evidence requires at least one artifact.
API assertions require at least one API request/response summary.
DB assertions require at least one database assertion summary.
Audit assertions require at least one audit event summary.
Evidence requires at least one artifact.
